case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,923.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (TRANSACTION ID # 63492031) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION  $1,923.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF AMINTA PATINO ONLY
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,923.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT ERIC HERRERA. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MOTION TO STRIKE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION THE CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION  $1,923.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-06-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF AMINTA PATINO IS GRANTED. THE CLAIMANT IS GRANTED LEAVE TO VERIFY THE CLAIM IF THE CLAIMANT APPEARS AT THE HEARING. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Raymond Fong of Office of The District Attorney telephone number 415-845-5807 for The People of The State of California.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE the claim of Aminta Patino is granted. The claimant is granted leave to verify the claim if the claimant appears at the hearing. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
